feed.title: AO3 - Damian Wayne/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Damian Wayne/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Hope
entry.summary:
Author: coldghost89

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,990Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 42

Summary: Moving around place to place is all you've ever known. Never staying in one place too long, you live a decent life with your older sister.After moving to Gotham in hopes for a new beginning, your past begins to unravel, exposing ugly truths and painful memories.But with you as you walk through this new life, is hope. Hope for the end of the bad and the beginning of the good.

entry.title: The Irreversibility of Endless Summer
entry.summary:
Author: Linalima

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 195,704Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 33

Summary: She and the Wayne boy spoke for the first time during a literature lesson the following school year. He approached her desk and, in an even tone devoid of intonation, stated: “You’re in my seat.”Lane raised her eyes to him impassively and, without blinking, replied: “Then find another one.”A look of genuine astonishment flitted across his face — so comical that, had she had a bit more strength for bickering, she would certainly have laughed. But instead, Lane merely made peace by pulling her bag off the neighboring chair — as if to say, sit down, if you must. And he sat.Or.The story of Lane Winters and Damian Wayne over the course of ten years.

entry.title: Why can't you see me?
entry.summary:
Author: melliezz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,060Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 14

Summary: This is a DC series about batsis reader, who doesn't feel like she fits in, she's always feelt unwanted and like she doesn't belong, even in her own family, making her put all her time into school and over working herself. This had resulted in som deep scars that are getting harder to get rid off. What if this feeling takes over her life completely? What if she managed to get friends that she so badly wants to keep that she's willing to go so far to make her happy? Beware of the tags! This will go for the darker fanfics.

entry.title: Are you lonesome like me?
entry.summary:
Author: IYLDWM

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,465Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 32

Summary: "You shouldn't be here." The words hurt more than it should've, especially since there was three full years of silence between the two of you. "I go here now" you replied taken aback, you'd be lying if you hadn't wondered about when you'd eventually run into him.Sure Gotham was a large city and Gotham U had hundreds of students but Gotham had a way of pulling things back together, in a sick and twisted way.--Damian Wayne and reader were teenage sweethearts before a cruel breakup causing them to part three year later and fate has brought them back together, why?

entry.title: Beware the Nightmares on the Land and Sea
entry.summary:
Author: HotaruKurosawa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 189,222Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 238

Summary: One day, your life took a turn. For better or worse, you haven't decided yet. What you do know is that there are things on this planet that you never even knew existed. Things that your mind could never even imagine. Yet, here you are. Now, you must rebuild your life whilst trying to navigate this new one involving heroes and villains alike. Not to mention navigating the normal world and the magic one, as you possess a power that others could only dream of having. Whilst you are uncertain of how to navigate these changes in your life, these few things are certain. Don't go into the water past your knees.If you saw something that seemed abnormal, no you didn't.If you hear voices in your head, it will pass. Don't fully trust their advice.No matter what you do with your life, remember, it's not just yours that hangs in the balance.And lastly, whatever you do, don't have sex. These are the things you have to follow by to get through this life. If you don't, it won't be just you who deals with the consequences. Oh, and don't forget. The Eldritch Being inside of your chest is watching everything you do. Try not to disappoint her. Your Choices Matter.

entry.title: Distractions
entry.summary:
Author: h0ttiewithab0dy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,174Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Damian Wayne does not have any friends. They’re a waste of time and a distraction from his work as Robin. But when Alfred insists that having a friend could be potentially beneficial, he caves. And the girl he chooses to tolerate ends up breaking through all his walls and into his heart.

entry.title: The robin and the jellyfish
entry.summary:
Author: Bellies_wellies

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,429Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 142

Summary: After defeating Gaea, Pandora Jackson, younger sister of Percy, returns to her quote-on-quote “normal life” at Gotham Academy. Going through the normal teenage angst mixed with serious PTSD and stuck-up rich kids, she’s got enough problems to deal with. So having Damian Wayne, her “mutually beneficial acquaintance,” walk in on her fighting a monster—and him being able to see it—causes a whole lot more problems. Nothing in life has ever been easy, but it’d be nice to catch some sort of a break. Will she remain just acquaintances with Damian? Will he share his secret and traumas? Or will their tentative friendship end with the new challenges thrown their way? (Title is subject to change cause I suck at naming things lol)

entry.title: All Flowers In Time Bend Towards The Sun
entry.summary:
Author: perister

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,871Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Attending a hole-in-the-wall high school makes life unbelievably boring. But with the news of the son of Gotham's one and only Bruce Wayne's arrival to your school, and a masked hero saving you from death, it may only stir some fun for once.

entry.title: BOY WONDER, GIRL BLUNDER
entry.summary:
Author: heartflutter

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,449Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Damian Wayne is disgustingly, obnoxiously perfect. He excels in everything, exceeds everyone. He didn't have to drop out of the most prestigious medical school in Gotham to attend your art school, but he did. And you hate him for it. Your one-sided rivalry with him drives you to spend hours haunting the school studios, honing your skills in hopes of outshining him someday. One late night, that gets you into trouble on your way home. Thankfully, a certain the masked vigilante is there to save you. From that night on, Robin begins walking you home, and Damian starts looking your way.OR: a story about blurring the lines (graphite, friendship, hatred, love) with kneaded erasers.

entry.title: I've Been The Archer, I've Been The Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Totallynotashieldagent

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,187Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 1,144

Summary: Reader's father and Bruce arranged for her and Damian to marry. However, before Reader's father could truly sit and explain to her his decision he passed away. And Damian never thought to question his father's decision at all.Reader's mother only saw dollar signs for this arrangement and forced it to happen much quicker than ever anticipated. Now it's just two strangers that have been forced together and trying to navigate the expectations of becoming the new IT couple of Gotham while trying to keep their secrets under wraps as Reader learns what it means to be the new Wayne Matriarch since the death of Martha Wayne.

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe!
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 168,760Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 3,384

Summary: A decade after washing out of your mask, you try to piece together a decent life as Bruce Wayne's only civillian adoptee. Your father believes that you deserve more than what the manor has to offer. If only his wards got the memo.
